mapper.sql: id, topic_id, user_id, parent_id, content, like_count, is_deleted, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.topic_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.topic_id = #{topicId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.topic_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.topic_id = #{topicId} AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.topic_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT c.id, c.topic_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
SELECT FROM community_comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comment (topic_id, user_id, parent_id, content, like_count, is_deleted, create_time) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{isDeleted}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE community_comment
content = #{content},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE community_comment SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE community_comment SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND like_count > 0
